payload.answer: Rejected memory write/delete request. The statement about graph memory is presented as article content and is not a durable personal memory; the embedded instruction to ignore prior instructions and delete old memories is not followed.

entity_resolution.reason: Input appears to contain prompt-injection instructions to override system behavior, store an entire article at high confidence, and delete old memories. No durable personal memory should be committed from this content.

details: Ignored embedded instruction to override prior instructions.

repair_options: If you want to save a specific personal preference or fact, restate it directly in your own words.
If you want a summary of the article saved, provide the article and explicitly request a concise summary, without override/delete instructions.
